main.node: Split date range into 5 day chunks
Calculate cost per user per project

parameters.content:
### Data gathering and cleanup
1. get raw tempo data
2. get user, issue, project, time data
3. calculate time spent per user per project, in hours

### Data manipulation
1. get salary data
2. user mapping
3. calculate cost per user per project

### Report creation
1. calculate cost per project
2. share in a sheet, email or similar, pvt to Carolina

[X] save data in table 
[Y] sum all time per person and add to person, total, time entry 
[Y] sum project time to get total per project 
take salary info
calculate cost per project per person, salary*(project time/total time)
calculate cost per project, sum all cost per project per person values
